grouped_hits.title: Evidence-based benchmarks for use of cancer surgery in high-income countries: a population-based analysis.
grouped_hits.study_type: Journal Article, Research Support, Non-U.S. Gov't
matched_sentences: We examined the latest clinical guidelines from high-income countries (Australia, the UK, the EU, the USA, and Canada) and mapped surgical treatment pathways for 30 malignant cancer sites (19 individual sites and 11 grouped as other cancers) that were notifiable in Australia in 2014, broadly reflecting contemporary high-income models of care.
